历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science (Physics) was approximately 111→95→109→94→186. From 2021 to 2024, it remained stable between 94 and 111. In 2025, the first year of the new college entrance exam (Physics category), it significantly dropped to about 186, a shift of about 92 places from 2024, indicating an abnormal fluctuation. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 186. The provincial Science enrollment plan was 26 in 2021, 25 each from 2022 to 2024, and 35 in 2025 (Physics category). In 2026, the Physics category plan is 52, an increase of about 48.6% from 2025, a significant expansion that helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; consistently ranked 2nd in the Soft Science main ranking for many years (2021–2026 all 2nd), top national level. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative (campus safety, dormitory, cafeteria, etc.), but as a top national university, reputation fluctuations have limited impact on application popularity. Douyin popularity ranking 3rd (high heat), with massive short video exposure, maintaining high application attention. The abnormal signal in 2025 admissions was high attention (first vacancy in Hubei early batch, Yuanpei course controversy, etc.), but overall it did not shake Peking University's admission pattern in Henan. Peking University has 40 A- or above disciplines, with A+ disciplines covering Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Law, Economics, Chinese Language and Literature, Philosophy, Sociology, Computer Science and Technology, etc., highly matching the enrollment majors, with top national academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Clinical Medicine, and other advantageous major categories of Peking University continue to be hot in 2026. Law, Economics, and other liberal arts categories show differentiation, but Peking University's platform advantage is prominent. The total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 1.2 million (uncertain), estimated at about 720,000 based on the recent Physics category proportion of about 60%, a significant increase from the 555,000 Physics candidates in 2025. Peking University is located in Beijing, not a provincial university. Henan Province is a major source of students, and Peking University's enrollment plan in Henan has been increasing in recent years (35 in 2025 Physics category → 52 in 2026), reflecting a tilt towards Henan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal shift in ranking in the first year of the new college entrance exam in 2025 (186th), the significant enrollment expansion of about 48.6% in 2026, the noticeable increase in provincial Physics candidates, the top reputation and high attention of the school: the expansion rate (48.6%) is greater than the candidate growth rate (about 30%), competition slightly eases, but the 2025 ranking was high due to first-year fluctuations, and 2026 should see a moderate correction. Predicted minimum ranking is about 220, with a range of 170–270.

If your ranking is around 220, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Electronic Information/Physics/Economics. If your ranking is close to 270, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors and pay attention to opportunities brought by the expansion.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Nanjing University in Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 1215, 1278, 1836, 1343, and 1328 respectively. In 2023, there was a noticeable shift to 1836, but it quickly rebounded to 1343 in 2024 and stabilized at 1328 in 2025, with a baseline ranking of about 1328–1343 in recent years, showing a high-level fluctuating trend. Nanjing University's enrollment plan in Beijing's comprehensive category: 37 in 2021, 42 in 2022, 39 in 2023, 35 in 2024, and 39 in 2025. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 41, an increase of 2 from 2025, a slight expansion of about 5.1%, which slightly eases competition but has limited impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science University Ranking, it ranked 5th in 2021 and remained stable at 6th from 2022 to 2026, consistently among the top universities in China, attracting high-scoring students. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation is slightly negative, mainly due to controversies in cafeteria and dormitory management (such as the 999 yuan king crab incident), but the overall impact is limited. Its Douyin popularity ranks 17th (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention. In terms of historical admission anomalies, there was moderate attention in 2022 due to differences in major groups, but no severe gaps occurred. Nanjing University has numerous A+/A/A- disciplines: Astronomy A+, Geology A+, Atmospheric Science A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Foreign Languages and Literature A+, Physics A+, Chemistry A+, Geography A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Business Administration A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, etc., with extremely strong academic strength, attracting many applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity remains high for Nanjing University's advantageous majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering. Liberal arts majors like Law and Chinese Language and Literature maintain stable popularity. In 2026, the total number of Beijing college entrance examination registrants is 84,900, an increase of about 19,466 from 65,434 in 2025 (an increase of about 29.7%), significantly intensifying competition. Regarding the provincial control line, the 2025 undergraduate batch was 430 points, slightly down from 434 points in 2024, with little change. Nanjing University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, and is not a local university for Beijing. In 2026, it enrolls 41 students in Beijing, a relatively small proportion, but Beijing applicants have high recognition of top universities in East China, with a positive regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1328, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+2 students), the significant increase in Beijing's total number of examinees (+29.7%), and the sustained attraction of the university's top tier and advantageous disciplines, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward compared to 2025. Taking into account the competitive pressure from the substantial increase in examinees, a small upward adjustment is made, predicting a minimum ranking of approximately 1399, with a fluctuation range of 1239–1559.
